version_description: Duran Duran - Wild Boys / Relax Medley (2011) https://open.spotify.com/track/6kWI0wIErtpMofkv9e9VXa?si=c52e6e24a7e64ce4.

performance.name: Live 2011: A Diamond In The Mind
performance.comment: Part of the All You Need Is Now tour. Album and film released July 2, 2012.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro- Wild Boys]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
N.C.[/tab]
Wild boys, wild boys, wild boys
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Wild boys[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Wild- boys[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
The wild boys are calling on their way back from the fire[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
In August moon's surrender to a dust cloud on the rise[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Wild boys fallen far from glory, reckless and so hungered[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
On the razor's edge you trail[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]
Because there's murder by the road side in a sore, afraid new world[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
  They tried to break us[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Looks like they'll try again[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never lose it[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never chose this way[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
Wild boys always-   shine[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
You got silence for a welcome and there's blood stains for your pain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                                  [ch]A[/ch]
And your telephone been ringing while you're dancing in the rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Wild boys wonder where is glory, where is all you angels[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Now the figureheads have fell[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
And lovers war with arrows over the secrets they could tell[/tab]


[Pre-chorus]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
  They tried to tame ya[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Looks like they'll try again[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never lose it[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never chose this way[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Wild boys always shine[/tab]


[Relax Medley]

[Verse 3]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Relax, don't do it when you want to sock to it[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
Relax, don't do it when you want to come[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Relax, don't do it when you want to sock to it[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Relax, don't do it when you want to come[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
When you want to come, when you want to come[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
When you want to come, when you want to come[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
Let's move it in the right direction[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Make making it your intention[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
Gotta live those dreams, scheme those schemes[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
You gotta hit me, hit me, hit me with those laser beams[/tab]


[Outro- Wild Boys]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never lose it[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never chose this way[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Wild boys always-[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never lose it[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never chose this way[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
(Wild boys, wild boys) Never close your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Wild boys always-[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]Dm[/ch]
Wild boys,    wild boys,   wild boys[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
            Wild boys[/tab]
